# ads.txt — JaldiDocs
#
# This file is a PLACEHOLDER for future Google AdSense integration.
#
# INSTRUCTIONS (after AdSense approval):
# 1. Log in to your Google AdSense account at adsense.google.com
# 2. Go to Account > Account information and copy your Publisher ID (ca-pub-XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX)
# 3. Replace this entire file with one line in the format below:
#
#    google.com, pub-XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX, DIRECT, f08c47fec0942fa0
#
# Replace XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX with your actual 16-digit AdSense Publisher ID.
# Do NOT add any other content to this file.
# Place this file at the root of your domain: https://yourdomain.com/ads.txt
#
# DO NOT use a fake or placeholder publisher ID — it violates AdSense policies.
# Leave this file as-is (comments only) until you have a real AdSense account.
